# LESSONS — demo fixture

Operational memory for the demo project. The first promoted entry below
gives the reviewer-send-back DRAFT block a real anchor to insert ahead
of (per `_review_emit_lesson_draft`'s "prepend before the first
non-draft ## YYYY-MM-DD entry" path).

## 2026-05-30 — bootstrap

The synthetic project ships its first ticket. The autonomous loop is
expected to open one PR, review it, and post a `<!-- DRAFT -->` block
right above this entry so the operator can see the artifact ticket 0022
generates in production.
